## Summary
Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Build/CI
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Related issues
Closes #

## Testing
- [ ] mvn test
- [ ] mvn checkstyle:check
- [ ] Not run (explain why):

## Checklist
- [ ] One concern per PR
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Updated docs/README/ARCHITECTURE if needed
- [ ] Regenerated GraalVM metadata if reflection/serialization changed
- [ ] Added console output or screenshots for user-facing changes
